title: Cocktail Table Cart - for 36''cocktail tables
features: Looking for a cart to hold cocktail tables?
Cocktail table cart for use with our 36'' cocktail tables.
Having been in the party rental business, we know how difficult it can be keeping track of the pieces for cocktail tables.
It takes forever to locate and carry the different components to set up for the next event.
Well, this is no longer a problem with our carts specifically designed to hold cocktail tables, belly bars, high boys, or whatever you call them.
Our cocktail table carts are built to hold everything you need to store and transport 10 cocktail tables.
Commercial-grade steel assembly assures strength and durability so you can focus on getting the event set up.
Just slide the tabletops in face-to-face, put the bases on the built-in poles on top, and slide the columns in the attached individual compartments.
Ships unassembled so some assembly is required.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k
